english translation text: DUA KUMAYL

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy, which embraces all things;

arabic text: وَبِقُوَّتِكَ الَّتِي قَهَرْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by Your strength, through which You dominatest all things,

arabic text: وَخَضَعَ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيْءٍ، وَذَلَّ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And toward which all things are humble; And before which all things are lowly;

arabic text: وَبِجَبرُوتِكَ الَّتِي غَلَبْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by Your invincibility through which You overwhelmest all things,

arabic text: وَبِعِزَّتِكَ الَّتِي لا يَقُومُ لَهَا شَيْءٌ
english translation text: And by Your might, which nothing can resist;

arabic text: وَبِعَظَمَتِكَ الَّتِي مَلأَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by Your tremendousness, which has filled all things;

arabic text: وَبِسُلْطَانِكَ الَّذِي عَلاَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: by Your force, which towers over all things;

arabic text: وَبِوَجْهِكَ الْبَاقِي بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by Your face, which subsists after the annihilation of all things,

arabic text: وَبِأَسْمَائِكَ الَّتِي مَلأَتْ أَرْكَانَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by Your Names, which have filled the foundations of all things;

arabic text: وَبِعِلْمِكَ الَّذِي أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by Your knowledge, which encompasses all things;

arabic text: وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضَاءَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: And by the light of Your face, through which all things are illumined!

arabic text: يَا نُورُ يَا قُدُّوسُ
english translation text: O Light! O All-holy!

arabic text: يَا أَوَّلَ الأَوَّلِينَ، وَيَا آخِرَ الآخِرِينَ
english translation text: O First of those who are first, And O Last of those who are last!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَهتِكُ الْعِصَمَ
english translation text: O Allah, forgive me those sins which tear apart safeguards!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ النِّقَمَ
english translation text: O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down adversities!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُغيِّرُ النِّعَمَ
english translation text: O Allah, forgive me those sins which alter blessings!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَحْبِسُ الدُّعَاءَ
english translation text: O Allah forgive me those sins which hold back supplication!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَقْطَعُ الرَّجَاءَ
english translation text: O Allah forgive me those sins which cut down the hopes!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ البَلاءَ
english translation text: O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down tribulation!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ وَكُلَّ خَطِيئَةٍ أَخْطَأْتُهَا
english translation text: O Allah, forgive me every sin I have committed and every mistake I have made!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِذِكْرِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, verily I seek nearness to You through remembrance of You,

arabic text: وَأَسْتَشْفِعُ بِكَ إِلَي نَفْسِكَ
english translation text: And I seek intercession from You with Yourself,

arabic text: وَأَسْألُكَ بِجُودِكَ أَن تُدْنِيَنِي مِن قُرْبِكَ
english translation text: And I ask You through Your munificence to bring me near to Your proximity,

arabic text: وَأَن تُوزِعَنِي شُكْرَكَ، وَأَن تُلْهِمَنِي ذِكْرَكَ
english translation text: And to provide me with gratitude toward You, and to inspire me with Your remembrance.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ خَاضِعٍ مُّتَذَلِّلٍ خَاشِعٍ ...
english translation text: O Allah, verily I ask You with the asking of a submissive, abased and lowly man…

arabic text: ... أَن تُسَامِحَنِي وَتَرْحَمَنِي
english translation text: …to show me forbearance, to have mercy on me

arabic text: وَتَجْعلَنِي بِقَسَمِكَ رَاضِياً قَانِعاً، وَفِي جَمِيعِ الأَحْوَاِل مُتَوَاضِعاً
english translation text: And to make me satisfied and content with Your appointment and [make me] humble in every state.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ وَأَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ مَنِ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ
english translation text: O Allah, I ask You the question of one whose indigence is extreme,

arabic text: وَأَنزَلَ بِكَ عِنْدَ الشَّدَائِدِ حَاجَتَهُ
english translation text: And who has stated to You in difficulties his need

arabic text: وَعَظُمَ فِيمَا عِنْدَكَ رَغْبَتُهُ
english translation text: And whose desire for what is with You has become great.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ عَظُمَ سُلْطَانُكَ وَعَلاَ مَكَانُكَ
english translation text: O Allah, Your force is tremendous, Your place is lofty,

arabic text: وَخَفِي مَكْرُكَ وَظَهَرَ أَمْرُكَ
english translation text: And Your plan is hidden, Your command is manifest,

arabic text: وَغَلَبَ قَهْرُكَ وَجَرَتْ قُدْرَتُكَ
english translation text: And Your domination is overwhelming, Your power is unhindered

arabic text: وَلا يُمْكِنُ الْفِرَارُ مِنْ حُكُومَتِكَ
english translation text: And escape from Your governance is impossible.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ لا أَجِدُ لِذُنُوبِي غَافِراً، وَّلا لِقَبَائِحِي سَاتِراً
english translation text: O Allah, I find no forgiver of my sins, Nor concealer of my ugly acts

arabic text: وَّلا لِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عَمَلِي الْقَبِيحِ بِالْحَسَنِ مُبَدِّلاً غَيْرَكَ
english translation text: Nor transformer of any of my ugly acts into good acts but You

arabic text: لا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنتَ، سُبْحَانَكَ وَبِحَمْدِكَ
english translation text: There is no god but You! Glory be to You, and Yours is the praise!

arabic text: ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي
english translation text: I have wronged myself,

arabic text: وَتَجَرَّأْتُ بِجَهْلِي
english translation text: And I have been audacious in my ignorance

arabic text: وَسَكَنتُ إِلَي قَدِيمِ ذِكْرِكَ لِي وَمَنِّكَ عَلَيَّ
english translation text: And I have depended upon Your ancient remembrance of me and Your favour toward me.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ مَوْلايَ، كَم مِّن قَبِيحٍ سَتَرْتَهُ
english translation text: O Allah! O my Protector! How many ugly things You hast concealed!

arabic text: وَكَم مِّن فَاِدحٍ مِّنَ البَلاءِ أَقَلْتَهُ
english translation text: How many burdensome tribulations You hast abolished!

arabic text: وَكَم مِّنْ عِثَارٍ وَّقَيْتَهُ، وَكَم مِّن مَّكْرُوهٍ دَفَعْتَهُ
english translation text: And how many stumbles You hast prevented! And how many ordeals You hast repelled!

arabic text: وَكَم مِّن ثَنَاٍء جَمِيلٍ لَّسْتُ أَهْلاً لَّهُ نَشَرْتَهُ
english translation text: And how much beautiful praise, for which I was unworthy, You hast spread abroad!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ عَظُمَ بَلائِي، وَأَفْرَطَ بِي سُوءُ حَاِلي
english translation text: O Allah, my tribulation is tremendous, and my bad state is excessive,

arabic text: وَقَصُرَتْ بِي أَعْمَاِلي، وَقَعَدَتْ بِي أَغْلاَلِي
english translation text: And my acts are inadequate, and my fetters have tied me down,

arabic text: وَحَبَسَنِي عَن نَّفْعِي بُعْدُ آمَاِلي
english translation text: And my far-fetched hopes have held me back from my gain

arabic text: وَخَدَعَتْنِي الدُّنْيَا بِغُرُورِهَا وَنَفْسِي بِجِنَايَتِهَا وَمِطَاِلي
english translation text: And this world with its delusions, my own soul with its offences and my delay have deceived me.

arabic text: يَا سَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِعِزَّتِكَ أَن لا يَحْجُبَ عَنْكَ دُعَائِي سُوءُ عَمَلِي وَفِعَاِلي
english translation text: O my Master! So I ask You by Your might not to let my evil works and acts veil my supplication from You,

arabic text: وَلا تَفْضَحَنِي بِخَفِيِّ مَا اطَّلَعْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ سِرِّي
english translation text: And not to disgrace me through the hidden things You knowest of my secrets

arabic text: وَلا تُعَاجِلْنِي بِالْعُقُوبَةِ عَلَى مَا عَمِلْتُهُ فِي خَلَوَاتِي
english translation text: And not to hasten me to punishment for what I have done in private:

arabic text: مِنْ سُوءِ فِعْلِي وَإِسَاءَتِي،
english translation text: My evil acts in secrecy and my misdeeds

arabic text: وَدَوَامِ تَفْرِيطِي وَجَهَالَتِي
english translation text: And my continuous negligence and my ignorance

arabic text: وَكَثْرَةِ شَهَوَاتِي وَغَفْلَتِي
english translation text: And my manifold passions and my forgetfulness.

arabic text: وَكُنِ اللَّهُمَّ بِعِزَّتِكَ لِي فِي كُلِّ الأَحْوَاِل رَؤُوفاً
english translation text: And by Your might, O Allah, be kind to me in all states

arabic text: وَّعَلَيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ الأُمُورِ عَطُوفاً
english translation text: And be gracious to me in all affairs!

arabic text: إِلَهِي وَرَبِّي مَن لِّي غَيْرُكَ أَسْألُهُ كَشْفَ ضُرِّي وَالْنَّظَرَ فِي أَمْرِي!
english translation text: My God and my Lord! Have I any but You from whom to ask removal of my affliction and regard for my affairs!

arabic text: إِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي أَجْرَيْتَ عَلَيَّ حُكْماً اتَّبَعْتُ فِيهِ هَوَى نَفْسِي،
english translation text: My God and my Protector! You put into effect through me a decree in which I followed the caprice of my own soul

arabic text: وَلَمْ أَحْتَرِسْ فِيهِ مِن تَزْيينِ عَدُوِّي،
english translation text: And [I] did not remain wary of adorning my enemy.

arabic text: فَغَرَّنِي بِمَا أَهْوَى وَأَسْعَدَهُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ القَضَاءُ
english translation text: So he deluded me through my soul's caprice and therein destiny favoured him

arabic text: فَتَجَاوَزْتُ بِمَا جَرَى عَلَيَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ بَعْضَ حُدُودِكَ
english translation text: So, in what was put into effect through me in that situation, I transgressed some of Your statutes

arabic text: وَخَالَفْتُ بَعْضَ أَوَامِرِكَ
english translation text: And disobeyed some of Your commands.

arabic text: فَلَكَ الْحُجَّةُ عَلَيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ ذَلِكَ
english translation text: So Yours is the argument against me in all of that

arabic text: وَلا حُجَّةَ لِي فِيمَا جَرَي عَلَيَّ فِيهِ قَضَاؤُكَ،
english translation text: I have no argument in what Your destiny put into effect through me therein

arabic text: وَأَلْزَمَنِي حُكْمُكَ وَبَلاؤُكَ
english translation text: nor in what Your decree and Your tribulation imposed upon me.

arabic text: وَقَدْ أَتَيْتُكَ يَا إِلَهِي بَعْدَ تَقْصِيرِي وَإِسْرَافِي عَلَى نَفْسِي
english translation text: Now I have come to You, My God, after my shortcoming and my immoderation toward myself,

arabic text: مُعْتَذِراً نَّادِماً، مُّنْكَسِراً،  مُّسْتَقِيلاً
english translation text: Offering my excuse, regretful, broken, apologizing,

arabic text: مُّسْتَغْفِراً، مُّنِيباً، مُّقِرّاً، مُّذْعِناً، مُّعْتَرِفاً
english translation text: Asking forgiveness, repenting, acknowledging, submissive, confessing.

arabic text: لا أَجِدُ مَفَرّاً مِّمَّا كَانَ مِنِّي
english translation text: I find no place to flee from what occurred through me,

arabic text: وَلا مَفْزَعاً أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْهِ في أَمْرِي
english translation text: Nor any place of escape to which I may turn in my affairs,

arabic text: غَيْرَ قَبُولِكَ عُذْرِي، وَإِدخَاِلكَ إِيَاي فِي سَعَةٍ مِّن رَّحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: Other than Your acceptance of my excuse and Your entering me into the compass of Your mercy.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ فَاقْبَل عُذْرِي، وَارْحَمْ شِدَّةَ ضُرِّي
english translation text: O Allah, so accept my excuse, Have mercy upon the severity of my affliction

arabic text: وَفُكَّنِي مِن شَدِّ وَثَاقِي
english translation text: And release me from the tightness of my fetters,

arabic text: يَا رَبِّ ارْحَمْ ضَعْفَ بَدَنِي وَرِقَّةَ جِلْدِي وَدِقَّةَ عَظْمِي
english translation text: My Lord, have mercy upon the weakness of my body, the thinness of my skin and the frailty of my bones.

arabic text: يَا مَنْ بَدَأَ خَلْقِي وَذِكْرِي وَتَرْبِيَتِي وَبِرِّي وَتَغْذِيَتِي
english translation text: O You who gave rise to my creation, to the remembrance of me, to the nurture of me, to goodness toward me and to nourishment on me,

arabic text: هَبْنِي لابْتِدَاءِ كَرَمِكَ وَسَاِلفِ بِرِّكَ بِي
english translation text: Bestow upon me for the sake of Your having given rise [to me] with generosity and Your previous goodness to me!

arabic text: يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَرَبِّي
english translation text: O Allah, my Master and my Lord!

arabic text: أَتُرَاكَ مُعَذِّبِي بِنَارِكَ بَعْدَ تَوْحِيدِكَ
english translation text: Can You see Yourself tormenting me with Your fire after I have professed Your Unity

arabic text: وَبَعْدَ مَا انْطَوَى عَلَيْهِ قَلْبِي مِن مَّعْرِفَتِكَ
english translation text: And after the knowledge of You my heart has embraced,

arabic text: وَلَهِجَ بِهِ لِسَانِي مِنْ ذِكْرِكَ
english translation text: And the remembrance of You my tongue has constantly mentioned

arabic text: وَاعْتَقَدَهُ ضَمِيرِي مِنْ حُبِّكَ
english translation text: And the love of You to which my mind has clung,

arabic text: وَبَعْدَ صِدْقِ اعْتِرَافِي وَدُعَائِي خَاضِعاً لِّرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
english translation text: And after the sincerity of my confession and my supplication, humble before Your lordship?

arabic text: هَيْهَاتَ أَنتَ أَكْرَمُ مِنْ أَن تُضَيِّعَ مَن رَّبَّيْتَهُ
english translation text: Far be it from You! You art more generous than that You shouldst squander him whom You hast nurtured,

arabic text: أَوْ تُبْعِدَ مَنْ أَدْنَيْتَهُ
english translation text: Or banish him whom You hast brought nigh,

arabic text: أَوْ تُشَرِّدَ مَنْ آوَيْتَهُ
english translation text: Or drive away him whom You hast given an abode

arabic text: أَوْ تُسْلِّمَ إِلىَ الْبلاءِ مَن كَفَيْتَهُ وَرَحِمْتَهُ
english translation text: Or submit to tribulation him whom You hast spared and shown mercy.

arabic text: وَلَيْتَ شِعْرِي يَا سَيِّدِي وَإِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي
english translation text: Would that I knew, my Master, My God and my Protector,

arabic text: أَتُسَلِّطُ النَّارَ عَلَى وُجُوهٍ خَرَّتْ لِعَظَمَتِكَ سَاجِدَةً
english translation text: Whether You would give the fire dominion over faces fallen down prostrate before Your Tremendousness,

arabic text: وَّعَلَى أَلْسُنٍ نَّطَقَتْ بِتَوْحِيدِكَ صَادِقَةً وَّبِشُكْرِكَ مَادِحَةً
english translation text: And over tongues voicing sincerely the profession of Your Unity and giving thanks to You in praise,

arabic text: وَّعَلَى قُلُوبٍ اعْتَرَفَتْ بِإِلَهِيَّتِكَ مُحَقِّقَةً
english translation text: And over hearts acknowledging Your Divinity through verification,

arabic text: وَّعَلَى ضَمَائِرَ حَوَتْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ بِكَ حَتَّى صَارَتْ خَاشِعَةً
english translation text: And over minds encompassing knowledge of You until they have become humble

arabic text: وَّعَلَى جَواِرحَ سَعَتْ إِلَى أَوْطَانِ تَعَبُّدِكَ طَائِعَةً وَّأَشَارَتْ
english translation text: And over bodily members speeding to the places of Your worship in obedience…

arabic text: بِاسْتِغْفَارِكَ مُذْعِنَةً
english translation text: …and beckoning for Your forgiveness in submission.

arabic text: مَّا هَكَذَا الظَّنُّ بِكَ وَلا أُخْبِرْنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَنكَ
english translation text: No such opinion is held of You! Nor has such been reported - thanks to Your bounty — concerning You,

arabic text: يَا كَرِيمُ،
english translation text: O All-generous!

arabic text: يَا رَبِّ
english translation text: My Lord,

arabic text: وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفِي عَن قَلِيلٍ مِّن بَلاءِ الدُّنْيَا وَعُقُوبَاتِهَا،
english translation text: And You knowest my weakness before a little of this world's tribulations and punishments,

arabic text: وَمَا يَجْرِي فِيهَا مِنَ الْمَكَارِهِ عَلَى أَهْلِهَا
english translation text: And before those ordeals which befall its inhabitants,

arabic text: عَلَى أَنَّ ذَلِكَ بَلاءٌ وَّمَكْرُوهٌ، قَلِيلٌ مَّكْثُهُ، يَسِيرٌ بَقَاؤُهُ، قَصِيرٌ مُّدَّتُهُ
english translation text: Even though it is a tribulation and ordeal whose stay is short, whose subsistence is but little and, whose period is but fleeting.

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ احْتِمَاِلي لِبَلاءِ الآخِرَةِ وَجَلِيلِ وُقُوعِ الْمَكَارِهِ فِيهَا!
english translation text: So how can I endure the tribulations of the next world and the great ordeals that occur within it?

arabic text: وَهُوَ بَلاءٌ تَطُولُ مُدَّتُهُ، وَيَدُومُ مَقَامُهُ، وَلا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْ أَهْلِهِ
english translation text: For it is a tribulation whose period is long, whose station endures and whose sufferers are given no respite,

arabic text: لأَنَّهُ لا يَكُونُ إِلاَّ عَنْ غَضَبِكَ وَانتِقَامِكَ وَسَخَطِكَ
english translation text: Since it only occurs as a result of Your wrath, Your vengeance and Your anger,

arabic text: وَهَذَا مَا لا تَقُومُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرْضُ
english translation text: And these cannot be withstood by the heavens and the earth.

arabic text: يَا سَيِّدِي فَكَيْفَ بِي
english translation text: O Master, so what about me?!

arabic text: وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ الضَّعِيفُ الذَّلِيلُ الْحَقِيرُ الْمِسْكِينُ الْمُسْتَكِينُ
english translation text: For I am Your weak, lowly, base, wretched and miserable slave.

arabic text: يَا إِلَهِي وَرَبِّي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي، لأَيِّ الأُمُورِ إِلَيْكَ أَشْكُو
english translation text: My God! My Lord! My Master! My Protector! For which things would I complain to You?

arabic text: وَلِمَا مِنْهَا أَضِجُّ وَأَبْكِي، لأَلِيمِ الْعَذَابِ وَشِدَّتِهِ!
english translation text: And for which of them would I lament and weep? For the pain and severity of chastisement?

arabic text: أَمْ لِطُولِ الْبَلاءِ وَمُدَّتِهِ!
english translation text: Or for the length and period of tribulation?

arabic text: فَلَئِن صَيَّرْتَنِي لِلْعُقُوبَاتِ مَعَ أَعْدَائِكَ
english translation text: So if You takest me to the punishments with Your enemies,

arabic text: وَجَمَعْتَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَهْلِ بَلائِكَ
english translation text: And gatherest me with the people of Your tribulation

arabic text: وَفَرَّقْتَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَحِبَّائِكَ وَأَوْلِيَائِكَ
english translation text: And separatest me from Your friends and saints,

arabic text: فَهَبْنِي يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَرَبِّي صَبَرْتُ عَلَى عَذَابِكَ،
english translation text: Then suppose, My God, my Master, my Protector and my Lord that I am able to endure Your chastisement,

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ أَصْبِرُ عَلَى فِرَاقِكَ
english translation text: How can I endure separation from You?

arabic text: وَهَبْنِي صَبَرْتُ عَلَى حَرِّ نَارِكَ،
english translation text: And suppose that I am able to endure the heat of Your fire,

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ أَصْبِرُ عَنِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى كَرَامَتِكَ
english translation text: How can I endure not gazing upon Your generosity?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ أَسْكُنُ فِي النَّارِ وَرَجَائِي عَفْوُكَ
english translation text: Or how can I dwell in the Fire while my hope is Your pardon?

arabic text: فَبِعِزَّتِكَ يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي أُقْسِمُ صَادِقاً، لَئِن تَرَكْتَنِي نَاطِقاً
english translation text: So by Your might, my Master and my protector, I swear sincerely, if You leavest me with speech,

arabic text: لأَضِجَّنَّ إِلَيْكَ بَيْنَ أَهْلِهَا ضَجِيجَ الآمِلِينَ
english translation text: I will lament to You from the midst of the Fire’s inhabitants with lamentation of the hopeful;

arabic text: وَلأَصْرُخَنَّ إِلَيكَ صُرَاخَ المُسْتَصْرِخِينَ
english translation text: I will cry to You with the cry of those crying for help;

arabic text: وَلأَبْكِيَنَّ عَلَيْكَ بُكَاءَ الفَاقِدِينَ
english translation text: I will weep to You with the weeping of the bereft;

arabic text: وَلأُنَادِيَنَّكَ أَيْنَ كُنتَ يَا وَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: And I will call to You, Where art You, O Sponsor of the believers,

arabic text: يَا غَايَةَ آمَاِل العَارِفِينَ، يَا غِيَاثَ المُسْتَغِيثِينَ
english translation text: O Goal of the hopes of Your knowers, O Aid of those who seek assistance,

arabic text: يَا حَبِيبَ قُلُوبِ الصَّادِقِينَ، وَيَا إِلَهَ العَالَمِينَ
english translation text: O Friend of the hearts of the sincere, And O God of all the world’s inhabitants!

arabic text: أَفَتُرَاكَ، سُبْحَانَكَ يَا إِلَهِي وَبِحَمْدِكَ، تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا صَوْتَ عَبْدٍ مُّسْلِمٍ
english translation text: Canst You see Yourself — Glory be to You My God, and Yours is the praised — hearing within the Fire the voice of a slave surrendered to You,

arabic text: سُجِنَ فِيهَا بِمُخَالَفَتِهِ
english translation text: Imprisoned there because of his violations,

arabic text: وَذَاقَ طَعْمَ عَذَابِهَا بِمَعْصِيَتِهِ
english translation text: Tasting the favour of its torment because of his disobedience,

arabic text: وَحُبِسَ بَيْنَ أَطْبَاقِهَا بِجُرْمِهِ وَجَرِيرَتِهِ
english translation text: And confined within its levels because of his sin and crime,

arabic text: وَهُوَ يَضِجُّ إلَيْكَ ضَجِيجَ مُؤَمِّلٍ لِّرَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: While he laments to You with the lament of one hopeful for Your mercy,

arabic text: وَيُنَادِيكَ بِلِسَانِ أَهْلِ تَوْحِيدِكَ
english translation text: And calls to You with the tongue of those who profess Your Unity

arabic text: وَيَتَوَسَّلُ إلَيْكَ بِرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
english translation text: And entreats You by Your lordship!

arabic text: يَا مَوْلاي فَكَيْفَ يَبقَى فِي الْعَذَابِ وَهُوَ يَرْجُو مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ حِلْمِكَ
english translation text: My Protector, so how should he remain in the chastisement, while he has hope for Your previous clemency?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ تُؤْلِمُهُ النَّارُ وَهُوَ يَامَلُ فَضْلَكَ وَرَحْمَتَكَ
english translation text: Or how should the Fire cause him pain while he expects Your bounty and mercy?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ يُحْرِقُهُ لَهِيبُهَا وَأَنتَ تَسْمَعُ صَوْتَهُ وَتَرَى مَكَانَهُ
english translation text: Or how should its flames burn him, while You hearest his voice and seest his place?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَشْتَمِلُ عَلَيْهِ زَفِيرُهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفَهُ
english translation text: Or how should its groaning encompass him, while You knowest his weakness?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَتَقَلْقَلُ بَيْنَ أَطْبَاقِهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ صِدْقَهُ
english translation text: Or how should he be convulsed among its levels, while You knowest his sincerity?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ تَزْجُرُهُ زَبَانِيَتُهَا وَهُوَ يُنَادِيكَ يَا رَبَّهُ
english translation text: Or how should its keepers torture him while he calls out to You, O Lord?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَرْجُو فَضْلَكَ فِي عِتْقِهِ مِنْهَا فَتَتْرُكُهُ فِيهَا
english translation text: Or how should he have hope of Your bounty in freeing him from it, while You abandonest him within it?

arabic text: هَيهَاتَ مَا ذَلِكَ الظَّنُّ بِكَ، وَلا الْمَعْرُوفُ مِن فَضْلِكَ
english translation text: Far be it from You! That is not what is expected of You, Nor what is well-known of Your bounty,

arabic text: وَلا مُشْبِهٌ لِمَا عَامَلْتَ بِهِ الْمُوَحِّدِينَ مِنْ بِرِّكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
english translation text: Nor it is similar to the goodness and kindness You hast shown to those who profess Your Unity.

arabic text: فَبِالْيَقِينِ أَقْطَعُ لَوْلا مَا حَكَمْتَ بِهِ مِن تَعْذِيبِ جَاحِدِيكَ
english translation text: So I declare with certainty that were it not for what You hast decreed concerning the chastisement of Your deniers

arabic text: وَقَضَيْتَ بِهِ مِنْ إِخْلاَدِ مُعَانِدِيكَ
english translation text: And what You hast foreordained concerning the everlasting home of those who stubbornly resist,

arabic text: لَجَعَلْتَ النَّارَ كُلَّهَا بَرْداً وَّسَلاَماً،
english translation text: You wouldst make the Fire, all of it, coolness and safety,

arabic text: وَمَا كَانَ لأَحَدٍ فِيهَا مَقَرّاً وَّلا مُقَاماً
english translation text: And no one would have a place of rest or abode within it.

arabic text: لَّكِنَّكَ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُكَ أَقْسَمْتَ أَنْ تَمْلأَهَا مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ،
english translation text: But You—holy are Your Names—hast sworn that You wilt fill it with the unbelievers,

arabic text: مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text: Both Jinn and men together,

arabic text: وَأَن تُخَلِّدَ فِيهَا الْمُعَانِدِينَ
english translation text: And that You wilt place those who stubbornly resist therein forever.

arabic text: وَأَنتَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ قُلْتَ مُبْتَدَئاً، وَّتَطَوَّلْتَ بِالإِنْعَامِ مُتَكَرِّماً:
english translation text: And You— majestic is Your eulogy— said at the beginning and wernt gracious through kindness as a favour,

arabic text: أَفَمَن كَانَ مُؤْمِنًا كَمَن كَانَ فَاسِقًا ۚ لَّا يَسْتَوُونَ
english translation text: (What? Is he who has been believer like unto him who has been ungodly? They are not equal)

arabic text: إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِالْقُدْرَةِ الَّتِي قَدَّرْتَهَا
english translation text: My God and my Master! So I ask You by the power You hast apportioned

arabic text: وَبِالْقَضِيَّةِ الَّتِي حَتَمْتَهَا وَحَكَمْتَهَا وَغَلَبْتَ مَنْ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرَيْتَهَا
english translation text: And by the decision which You hast determined and imposed and through which You hast overcome him toward whom it has been put into effect,

arabic text: أَن تَهَبَ لِي، فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ، وَفِي هَذِهِ السَّاعَةِ
english translation text: That You forgivest me in this night and at this hour

arabic text: كُلَّ جُرْمٍ أَجْرَمْتُهُ، وَكُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ
english translation text: Every offence I have committed, And every sin I have performed,

arabic text: وَكُلَّ قَبِيحٍ أَسْرَرْتُهُ، وَكُلَّ جَهْلٍ عَمِلْتُهُ،
english translation text: And every ugly thing I have concealed, And every folly I have enacted

arabic text: كَتَمْتُهُ أَوْ أَعْلَنتُهُ، أَخفَيْتُهُ أَوْ أَظْهَرْتُهُ
english translation text: Whether I have hidden or announced it, Or I have concealed it or manifested it

arabic text: وَكُلَّ سَيِّئَةٍ أَمَرْتَ بِإِثْبَاتِهَا الْكِرَامَ الكَاتِبِينَ
english translation text: And every evil act which You hast commanded the Noble Writers to record,

arabic text: الَّذِينَ وَكَّلْتَهُم بِحِفْظِ مَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي
english translation text: Those whom You hast appointed to watch over what appears from me

arabic text: وَجَعَلْتَهُمْ شُهُوداً عَلَيَّ مَعَ جَوَارِحِي،
english translation text: And whom You hast made, along with my bodily members, witness against me.

arabic text: وَكُنتَ أَنتَ الرَّقِيبَ عَلَيَّ مِن وَّرَائِهِمْ،
english translation text: And You wast Yourself the Watcher over me from behind them,

arabic text: وَالشَّاهِدَ لِمَا خَفِي عَنْهُمْ،
english translation text: And the Witness of what is hidden from them

arabic text: وَبِرَحْمَتِكَ أَخْفَيْتَهُ، وَبفَضْلِكَ سَتَرْتَهُ
english translation text: But through Your mercy You concealed it, And through Your bounty You veiled it.

arabic text: وَأَن تُوَفِّرَ حَظِّي مِن كُلِّ خَيْرٍ تُنْزِلُهُ،
english translation text: [And I ask You] that You bestowest upon me an abundant share of every good You sendest down,

arabic text: أَوْ إِحْسَانٍ تُفْضِلُهُ، أَوْ بِرٍّ تَنْشِرُهُ، أَوْ رِزْقٍ تَبْسُطُهُ
english translation text: Or kindness You confer, Or goodness You unfold, Or provision You spread out,

arabic text: أَوْ ذَنْبٍ تَغْفِرُهُ، أَوْ خَطَأٍ تَسْتُرُهُ
english translation text:
Or sin You forgive,
Or error You cover.

arabic text: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!

arabic text: يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَمَاِلكَ رِقِّي، يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ نَاصِيَتِي
english translation text: My God! My Master! My Protector! Owner of my freedom! O He in whose hand is my destiny!

arabic text: يَا عَلِيماً بِضُرِّي وَمَسْكَنَتِي
english translation text: O He who knows my affliction and my misery!

arabic text: يَا خَبِيراً بِفَقْرِي وَفَاقَتِي
english translation text: O He who is aware of my poverty and starvation!

arabic text: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!

arabic text: أَسْألُكَ بِحَقِّكَ وَقُدْسِكَ
english translation text: I ask You by Your Truth and Your Holiness

arabic text: وَأَعْظَمِ صِفَاتِكَ وَأَسْمَائِكَ
english translation text: And the greatest of Your Attributes and Names,

arabic text: أن تَجْعَلَ أَوْقَاتِي فِي اللَّيلِ وَالنَّهَارِ بِذِكْرِكَ مَعْمُورَةً،
english translation text: That You make my time in the night and the day inhabited by Your remembrance,

arabic text: وَبِخِدْمَتِكَ مَوْصُولَةً، وَّأَعْمَاِلي عِنْدَكَ مَقْبُولَةً،
english translation text: And joined to Your service, And my works acceptable to You,

arabic text: حَتَّى تَكُونَ أَعْمَاِلي وَأَوْرَادِي كُلُّهَا وِرْداً وَّاحِداً،
english translation text: So that my actions and my offerings may all be a single effort

arabic text: وَّحَاِلي فِي خِدْمَتِكَ سَرْمَداً
english translation text: And my occupation with Your service everlasting.

arabic text: يَا سَيِّدِي، يَا مَنْ عَلَيْهِ مُعَوَّلِي
english translation text: My Master! O He upon whom I depend!

arabic text: يَا مَنْ إلَيْهِ شَكَوْتُ أَحْوَاِلي
english translation text: O He to whom I complain about my states!

arabic text: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!

arabic text: قَوِّ عَلَى خِدْمَتِكَ جَوَارِحِي
english translation text: Strengthen my limbs in Your service,

arabic text: وَاشْدُدْ عَلىَ الْعَزِيمَةِ جَوَانِحِي
english translation text: And fortify my ribs in determination

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِي الْجِدَّ فِي خَشْيَتِكَ
english translation text: And bestow upon me earnestness in my fear of You

arabic text: وَالدَّوَامَ فِي الإتِّصَاِل بِخِدْمَتِكَ
english translation text: And continuity in my being joined to Your service

arabic text: حَتَّى أَسْرَحَ إِلَيكَ فِي مَيَادِينِ السَّابِقِينَ
english translation text: So that I may move easily towards You in the battlefields of the foremost

arabic text: وَأُسْرِعَ إلَيْكَ فِي الْمبُادِرِينَ
english translation text: And hurry to You among the prominent

arabic text: وَأَشْتَاقَ إلىَ قُرْبِكَ فِي الْمُشْتَاقِينَ
english translation text: And desire fervently Your proximity among the fervently desirous

arabic text: وَأَدْنُوَ مِنْكَ دُنُوَّ الْمُخْلِصِينَ
english translation text: And move nearer to You with the nearness of the sincere

arabic text: وَأَخَافَكَ مَخَافَةَ الْمُوقِنِينَ
english translation text: And fear You with the fear of those who have certitude

arabic text: وَأَجْتَمِعَ فِي جِوَارِكَ مَعَ الْمُؤْمنِينَ
english translation text: And gather with the believers in Your vicinity.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ وَمَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِسُوٍء فَأَرِدْهُ
english translation text: O Allah, whoever desires evil for me, desire [it] for him!

arabic text: وَمَن كَادَنِي فَكِدْهُ
english translation text: whoever deceives me-deceive him!

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَحَسَنِ عَبِيدِكَ نَصِيباً عِنْدَكَ
english translation text: And make me one of the most excellent of Your slaves in Portion from You,

arabic text: وَأَقْرَبِهِم مَّنْزِلَةً مِّنْكَ
english translation text: And the nearest of them in station to You

arabic text: وَأَخَصِّهِمْ زُلْفَةً لَّديْكَ
english translation text: And the most elected of them in proximity to You.

arabic text: فَإِنَّهُ لا يُنَالُ ذَلِكَ إِلاَّ بِفَضْلِكَ
english translation text: For that cannot be attained except by Your bounty.

arabic text: وَجُدْ لِي بِجُودِكَ
english translation text: And grant generously to me through Your munificence,

arabic text: وَاعْطِفْ عَلَيَّ بِمَجْدِكَ
english translation text: And incline toward me with Your splendour

arabic text: وَاحْفَظْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: And protect me with Your mercy!

arabic text: وَاجْعَل لِّسَانِي بِذِكْرِكَ لَهِجاً
english translation text: And make my tongue remember You without ceasing

arabic text: وَّقَلْبِي بِحُبِّكَ مُتَيَّماً
english translation text: And my heart enthralled by Your love!

arabic text: وَّمُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِحُسْنِ إِجَابَتِكَ
english translation text: And be gracious to me by answering me favourably,

arabic text: وَأَقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي، وَاغْفِرْ زَلَّتِي،
english translation text: And nullify my slips, And forgive my lapses!

arabic text: فَإِنَّكَ قَضَيْتَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ بِعِبَادَتِكَ
english translation text: For You hast decreed Your worship for Your servants

arabic text: وَأَمَرْتَهُم بِدُعَائِكَ
english translation text: And commanded them to supplicate You

arabic text: وَضَمِنتَ لَهُمُ الإِجَابَةَ
english translation text: And assured them that they would be answered.

arabic text: فَإِلَيْكَ يَا رَبِّ نَصَبْتُ وَجْهِي
english translation text: So toward You, my Lord, I have turned my face

arabic text: وَإلَيْكَ يَا رَبِّ مَدَدتُّ يَدِي
english translation text: And toward You, my Lord, I have extended my hand.

arabic text: فَبِعِزَّتِكَ اسْتَجِبْ لِي دُعَائِي
english translation text: So by Your might, comply with my supplication

arabic text: وَبَلِّغْنِي مُنَاي
english translation text: And make me attain my desires!

arabic text: وَلا تَقْطَعْ مِن فَضْلِكَ رَجَائِي
english translation text: Do not severe my hoping for Your Favours

arabic text: وَاكْفِنِي شَرَّ الْجِنِّ وَالإِنْسِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِي
english translation text: And spare me the evil of my enemies from among the jinn and men!

arabic text: يَا سَرِيعَ الرِّضَا
english translation text: O He, whose pleasure is quickly achieved!

arabic text: اغْفِرْ لِمَن لا يَمْلِكُ إِلاَّ الدُّعَاءَ
english translation text: Forgive him who owns nothing but supplication

arabic text: فَإِنَّكَ فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا تَشَاءُ
english translation text: For You dost what You wilt.

arabic text: يَا مَنْ اسْمُهُ دَوَاءٌ
english translation text: O He whose Name is a remedy,

arabic text: وَذِكْرُهُ شِفَاءٌ
english translation text: And whose remembrance is a cure,

arabic text: وَطَاعَتُهُ غِنًى
english translation text: And whose obedience is wealth!

arabic text: ارْحَم مَّن رَّأْسُ مَاِلهِ الرَّجَاءُ
english translation text: Have mercy upon him whose capital is hope

arabic text: وَسِلاَحُهُ الْبُكَاءُ
english translation text: And whose weapon is tears!

arabic text: يَا سَاِبغَ النِّعَمِ، يَا دَافِعَ النِّقَمِ
english translation text: O Ample in blessings! O Repeller of adversities!

arabic text: يَا نُورَ الْمُسْتَوْحِشِينَ فِي الظُّلَمِ
english translation text: O Light of those who are lonely in the darkness!

arabic text: يَا عَالِماً لا يُعَلَّمُ
english translation text: O Knower who was never taught!

arabic text: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and Muhammad's household!

arabic text: وافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنتَ أَهْلُهُ
english translation text: And do with me what is worthy of You!

arabic text: وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ وَالأَئِمَّةِ الْمَيَامِينَ مِنْ آلِهِ
english translation text: And Allah bless His messenger and the holy Imams of his household

arabic text: وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً كَثِيراً
english translation text: And give them abundant peace!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
